scores.metric: sandbox --disable all (masked Levenshtein); pad cheat stripped
scores.note: HEAD byte-matches the full build ONLY via the forbidden s32 pad[2] frame-coercion cheat. Honest distance (pad stripped) = 12, all of it a single +8-byte frame-size delta.

sessions.lever: removed pad[2] (confirmed inert to body; distance stays 12 = pure frame-size diff). No recoverable semantic local for the 8-byte sp+16..23 hole.

reviewer.verdict: N/A — block for forbidden-frame-cheat / unrecoverable local
reviewer.evidence: All 12 honest diffs are one +8-byte frame-size delta; body byte-identical. The only forms producing the 48-byte frame are forbidden dead-array/frame-coercion cheats (s32 pad[2] or a named guess). Target never accesses the 8-byte hole, so no semantic local is recoverable from the body.

remaining_gap.summary: 12 diffs = 6 prologue saves + 6 epilogue restores at offsets shifted by 8, + the two addiu-sp insns. Frame is 40 (ours, honest) vs 48 (target). The extra 8 bytes is an unused stack hole at sp+16..23 the target reserves but never touches — a phantom local whose uses were fully DCE'd.
remaining_gap.cheat_at_head: s32 pad[2]; unused local array (find_unused_local_arrays / dead-vars-local-array, FORBIDDEN) — HEAD's full-build match depends on it.
remaining_gap.rules_required_for_full_match: A genuine 8-byte local with recoverable semantic meaning AND real (even if folded) body use. None recoverable from the byte-identical body. Phantom pad / named-guess arrays are forbidden.

next_hypotheses: Caller/data-layout analysis: inspect callers of func_8001924C and the g_file_data_buf record format to see if the loop originally filled a stack struct/array passed to func_80019310 / single_game_setModeRequest — the body shows no such use, but a wider view might reveal a genuine local.

If no semantic local is recoverable, this is canonical-asm / park territory (unrecoverable phantom frame local) — surface for user authorization. It is on the dead-vars-local-array re-evaluation list (code6cac.c, 2026-05-31).

rejected_forms.why: FORBIDDEN frame-coercion dead array; sandbox strips it -> honest 12
pure +8-byte frame gap remains; confirms pad is inert to the body
